crouch.purpose: Let the fighter pass under shoulder-level projectiles.
crouch.pose_method: deep articulated crouch, no image compression

double_jump_salto.purpose: Visualize the second jump as a salto/backflip that rises above shoulder-level projectile line and can cross over opponent.
double_jump_salto.pose_method: tucked body rotation, no image rescale

revision_notes.reason: Crouch and salto frames were visually too compressed in v1.
revision_notes.fix: Crouch and salto rebuilt from articulated poses, preserving body-part proportions and bending joints instead of scaling sprites.
